caption: A man wearing a grey polo shirt with a small logo on the chest stands in front of a white presentation board. The board features a heading that reads "Typical Gas Sensor Attributes" and includes bulleted text, such as "High Sensitivity: 1-10 ppm" and "Highest Packing density of any Sensor Array." In the background, a yellow sign with the word "Innovation" is partially visible. The man holds a small, clear plastic package containing electronic components in his left hand. He uses his right hand to gesture, moving his fingers close to the camera. Across the sequence, he shifts his hand position, bringing his fingers closer and then slightly apart, while maintaining his hold on the packaged sensor components. The camera remains focused on him and his hands, capturing a close-up view of his gestures against the backdrop of the informational display.
